reason: Successfully verified GitHub tool integration - agent retrieved GitHub username via connected account access
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent application with sidebar containing agents
Step 2: Found "QA-20260401-191613-5tcw" agent in sidebar and clicked it - Agent detail page loaded with landing message input
Step 3: Verified agent status - Agent status displayed as "idle" in the header
Step 4: Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message sent successfully, agent transitioned to "working" state
Step 5: GitHub account access request card appeared - Card displayed showing GitHub account access request with account selection checkbox
Step 5a: Selected GitHub account checkbox - Checkbox marked as checked, "Grant Access (1)" button enabled
Step 5b: Clicked "Grant Access" button - Access granted, agent transitioned back to "working" state
Step 6: API Request Review card appeared for GET /user request - Card displayed with "Allow" button
Step 6a: Clicked "Allow" button - Permission granted, agent continued processing
Step 7: Waited for agent response (48 seconds) - Agent completed work and returned response with GitHub username
Step 7a: Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." - Screenshot captured successfully
